overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a cowboy character exploring a geothermal hot spring area in mountainous wilderness. The character walks along rocky terrain, wades through shallow turquoise water with steam rising, and ascends a grassy hillside surrounded by sparse pine trees and distant mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: geothermal hot spring basin with rocky terrain

agents.ego_description: walking along the rocky edge of geothermal pools, approaching the turquoise water while observing the steam rising from the hot springs

entered.detail: large turquoise geothermal pool with steam rising from the surface
gray and white mineral-stained rocky ground surrounding the hot springs
tall dead pine trees scattered across the landscape
distant mountain peaks illuminated by morning sunlight
steam rising from geothermal vents near the hot springs

segments.scene_description: The character walks along rocky terrain surrounding turquoise geothermal pools. Steam rises from the hot springs as morning sunlight illuminates the distant mountains and dead pine trees scattered across the landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow geothermal hot spring with mineral terraces

events.description: character steps from rocky terrain into the shallow turquoise water of the hot spring

agents.ego_description: wading through the shallow, clear turquoise water of the geothermal pool, creating ripples with each step

entered.detail: white and orange mineral deposits forming terraces along the pool edges

segments.scene_description: The character wades through the shallow, steaming turquoise water of the hot spring. Mineral deposits form white terraces along the pool edges while steam rises and distant mountains remain visible through the morning light.

events.description: character exits the water and steps onto grassy terrain
character steps over a fallen log blocking the path on the hillside

agents.ego_description: walking uphill through tall grass, stepping over a fallen log, heading toward the distant tree line

entered.detail: tall yellow-green grass covering the sloping terrain
large fallen tree trunk lying across the path
thick forest of green pine trees on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character exits the hot spring onto a grassy hillside, continuing uphill through tall prairie grass. A fallen log lies across the path as the terrain transitions from geothermal rock to forested grassland with distant mountains framing the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the steaming edges of geothermal pools up onto a lush, mountainous hillside. It begins with the character walking across rocky terrain surrounding turquoise hot springs, where steam rises into the morning light beneath a backdrop of distant peaks and dead pine trees. As the character wades directly into the shallow, steaming turquoise water, the camera captures white mineral deposits forming terraces along the pool's edges. The scene then shifts as the character exits the water and ascends a grassy slope, moving through tall prairie grass and past a fallen log. Finally, the terrain transitions completely from geothermal rock to a forested grassland, with the distant mountains framing the horizon.
